description: Relation-aware authorization engine for TypeScript — define policies in YAML, resolve roles through relations, check permissions with can()
rules: Toride is an in-process library, not a hosted service
Policies are defined in YAML, not code
Resolvers are plain functions — any data source works
Use buildConstraints() for data filtering instead of checking each record with can()
Always handle all three constraint results: forbidden, unrestricted, and constraints
